emails.subject: Talking points
emails.body: Here you go! Anything you think we need to add? You in Houston today? I'm working from home my dad's in town until tomorrow, so I'm supervising some "daddy dos." kd Forwarded by Karen Denne/Corp/Enron on 04/30/2001 02:01 PM Janel Guerrero 04/30/2001 02:05 PM

emails.subject: Re: Talking points
emails.body: Re: Talking points Hey! I'm in Houston. You'll have my backgrounder tomorrow. (The way things are going today, I'll be working on it till the wee hours tonite.) Best, Jeff
